name: Zoho CRM
description: Zoho CRM customer relationship management. Monitor user access, roles, profiles, and organization settings.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to Zoho API Console at https://api-console.zoho.com
2. Create a Self Client application
3. Generate a token with scopes: ZohoCRM.users.READ, ZohoCRM.settings.READ, ZohoCRM.org.READ
4. Paste the access token below
5. If your Zoho account is not in the US region, enter your data center domain (e.g. www.zohoapis.eu for EU)

Note: For long-term use, set up OAuth2 refresh tokens via Zoho API Console.

credentialFields.label: OAuth Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: Generate from Zoho API Console (https://api-console.zoho.com). Create a Self Client, generate token with scopes: ZohoCRM.users.READ, ZohoCRM.settings.READ, ZohoCRM.org.READ.

credentialFields.label: Zoho Data Center Region
credentialFields.helpText: Your Zoho data center domain. Examples: www.zohoapis.com (US), www.zohoapis.eu (EU), www.zohoapis.in (IN), www.zohoapis.com.au (AU), www.zohoapis.jp (JP), www.zohoapis.com.cn (CN).

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all Zoho CRM users and verifies their account status.

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Verifies that Zoho CRM has roles and profiles configured for access control.

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies that the Zoho CRM API is accessible and returns organization information.
